fields.name: CoolBreeze 1 Ton 3 Star Window AC
fields.description: Energy efficient 1 ton window AC with 3 star rating, auto restart, sleep mode and dust filter. Ideal for rooms up to 120 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 1.5 Ton 3 Star Split AC
fields.description: 1.5 ton split AC with 3 star rating, turbo cool technology, auto clean and dehumidifier function. Ideal for rooms up to 180 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC
fields.description: Premium 1.5 ton inverter split AC with 5 star rating, wifi control, auto diagnosis and 4 way swing. Ideal for rooms up to 180 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 2 Ton 3 Star Split AC
fields.description: Heavy duty 2 ton split AC with 3 star rating, rapid cooling, self cleaning filter and auto restart after power cut. Ideal for rooms up to 240 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 1 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC
fields.description: Compact 1 ton inverter split AC with 5 star rating, voice control, pm 2.5 filter and weekly timer. Ideal for rooms up to 120 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 2 Ton 5 Star Inverter Cassette AC
fields.description: Commercial grade 2 ton cassette AC with 5 star inverter rating, 360 degree airflow, central drain pump and remote diagnostics. Ideal for offices up to 300 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 1.5 Ton Portable AC
fields.description: No installation required portable AC with 1.5 ton capacity, dual fan speed, dehumidifier mode and 24 hour timer. Ideal for temporary cooling needs.

fields.name: CoolBreeze 2 Ton Tower AC
fields.description: Floor standing 2 ton tower AC with inverter technology, 7 speed fan, air purifier with HEPA filter and child lock. Ideal for large halls up to 280 sq ft.

fields.name: CoolBreeze AC Voltage Stabilizer 5KVA
fields.description: Heavy duty voltage stabilizer for ACs up to 2 ton. Protects against voltage fluctuations between 90V to 290V with time delay and digital display.

fields.name: CoolBreeze Universal AC Remote Control
fields.description: Universal remote compatible with all CoolBreeze AC models. Features LCD display, timer, sleep mode and turbo button. Includes 2 AAA batteries.

fields.reason: Stabilizer stopped working after 3 days. AC not turning on.
AC is making loud noise during operation. Not acceptable.
AC not cooling properly even after installation by technician.
Window AC leaking water inside the room.
AC dispatched 5 days ago but not delivered yet. Want refund.
Want to return — changed my mind

fields.content: Hi
Hi there, how can I help you today with Order #1?
where is my order

Your order is currently in transit and shows as being at the Bangalore Sorting Hub as of 2 days ago. It is delayed due to high volume at the facility, but it's expected to be delivered tomorrow. I do want to flag that this order was placed 440 days ago, which is unusual, so let me know if there's more context I should be aware of.
hi
Hi, thanks for reaching out to CoolBreeze AC support. I can see your order for the CoolBreeze 1.5 Ton 3 Star Split AC, which shows as delivered. How can I help you with it today?
where is my order

According to our records, this order was already delivered to your address on Residency Road, Shivajinagar, back on time. This was quite a while ago, around 485 days. Are you having trouble locating the unit, or is there a different issue I can help with?
i want refund

Thanks for waiting. I see this order was placed 485 days ago and delivered, which is well outside our standard return window. I also see you had a refund request on this same order back in March 2025 for a noise issue, which was denied. Can you tell me more about why you're requesting a refund now?
its very long time and i dont want it now

I've discussed this with my team, and I'm sorry to say the refund has been denied. Since the order was delivered 485 days ago and this is a change of mind rather than a product issue, it falls outside our refund policy. Is there anything else I can help you with?
hi
Hi, thanks for reaching out. I can see your order for the CoolBreeze 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC, which was delivered. How can I help you with it today?
i want refund

I see this order was delivered and it's been about 546 days since it was placed, which is well outside our standard return window. Can you tell me what issue you're facing with the AC that's prompting the refund request?
ac stop working

Thanks for your patience. Since your order is 546 days old and already delivered, and this is a hardware issue rather than a delivery problem, a refund isn't something I can approve directly. I'll escalate this to my team for a decision and get back to you. Would you like me to go ahead with that?
yes

Thanks for waiting. My team has reviewed this and since the AC is 546 days old and was delivered successfully, this falls under a warranty issue rather than a refund case, so the refund request has been denied. I'd recommend getting a technician inspection through our warranty service team for repair or part replacement. Would you like me to help you get that scheduled?
hi
Hi again, is there anything else I can help you with regarding your order?
where is my order

Your order is still in transit, last seen at the Bangalore Sorting Hub 2 days ago, and it's expected to be delivered tomorrow due to high volume at the facility. I understand this is frustrating, especially since the order was placed quite a while ago. Is there anything specific you'd like me to look into further?
hi
Hi, I see you have Order #3 for a CoolBreeze AC Voltage Stabilizer, which shows as delivered. How can I help you with this order today?
i want refund

Thanks for waiting. I can see this order was delivered and was placed 509 days ago, which is well beyond our standard refund window. Can you tell me what issue you're facing with the product so I can pass on the full details to my team?
talk to manager

I've heard back from my team. Unfortunately, the refund for Order #3 has been denied since it's 509 days past delivery, well outside our refund window, and no specific product issue was reported. If you're facing an actual defect or problem with the item, please share the details and I can have the case reopened for review.
ok
Alright, I'm here if you need anything else. Take care.
i want refund

I understand, but as I mentioned, this order is 509 days past delivery which is outside our refund policy window, and my team has already reviewed and denied this request. Is there a specific defect or issue with the product itself that I should know about? That would help me escalate this properly.
talk to manager

I've already escalated this once and my team denied it due to the order being 509 days past delivery with no reported defect. I see you also had a previous refund request denied for a different order. Since there's no new information or product issue provided, I'm not able to escalate this again without a valid reason. If something is actually wrong with the stabilizer, please share the details.
were is my refund

To be clear, no refund has been approved for Order #3. My team reviewed this request and denied it because the order is 509 days past delivery, which is far outside our refund policy window, and no product defect was reported. If there is an actual issue with the item, I am happy to look into it further, but currently there is no refund being processed.
talk to manager again

I understand you're frustrated, but I want to be transparent with you. This case has already been reviewed and denied by my team due to the order being 509 days past the delivery window with no reported product issue. Escalating again without any new information will not change that outcome, so I'd need you to share a specific problem with the AC unit before I can take this further.
please talk to manager

I hear you, and I want to help, but I need some new information first. Is there something actually wrong with the stabilizer, like a defect or it not working properly? If you can tell me the specific issue, I will escalate this to my manager right away with all the details.
what is refund policy

Our refund policy generally allows returns or refunds within a limited window after delivery, typically for defective items or products that arrive damaged. Since Order #3 was delivered 509 days ago, it falls well outside that standard window. If there's a specific defect or issue with the product, that could still be considered, so please let me know if that's the case.
but your agent contected me and promise the reunf

My manager has reviewed this again and the refund for Order #3 has been denied. There's no record of any refund promise on file, no product defect has been reported, and the request is far outside our policy window. If you're experiencing an actual issue with the stabilizer, please share the details and I'll be glad to help further.
hi

Hello, I'm still here to help. Just to recap, Order #3 was denied for a refund since it is 509 days past delivery with no reported product issue. Is there anything else I can help you with, or is there a specific problem with the AC unit you'd like to describe?
hi again
Hi, I'm here. Is there something specific I can help you with regarding Order #3, or any other order?
please talk to user manager and give me the final message

I've reviewed this with my team one final time. The refund request for Order #3 remains denied because the order is 509 days past delivery, well outside our policy window, and no product defect has been reported at any point in this conversation. This is our final decision on this matter. If you experience an actual issue with the unit going forward, please reach out and we will be glad to assist.
can please talk to manger about refund

I understand you keep asking, but I need to be honest with you. This case has already been escalated and reviewed by my manager multiple times, and the decision remains the same: the refund is denied due to the order being 509 days past delivery with no reported defect. Escalating again without new information will not change this outcome.
hi
Hi there. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
hi
Hello again. Is there something specific about your order I can help with?
hi
Hi again, is there something else I can help you with regarding your order?
